Name: Bath & Body Works Inc.
Description: Bath & Body Works Inc. (BBWI) stands as a premier specialty retailer renowned for its diverse portfolio of premium personal care products, including body care, skincare, fragrances, and home fragrances. The company leverages a strong omnichannel strategy that combines an extensive physical retail presence with a robust online platform, driving customer loyalty and engagement. Continued innovation and adaptive marketing strategies enable Bath & Body Works to respond effectively to evolving consumer preferences within the dynamic beauty and personal care landscape. As a subsidiary of L Brands, Inc., Bath & Body Works benefits from operational synergies while remaining committed to sustainability and community initiatives, positioning itself for sustained growth and industry leadership.
Address: THREE LIMITED PARKWAY, COLUMBUS, OH, UNITED STATES, 43230
